instruction: 帮我把区域销售情况记录一下

command: DISPLAY=:1 gsettings set org.gnome.desktop.screensaver idle-activation-enabled false 2>/dev/null; DISPLAY=:1 gsettings set org.gnome.desktop.session idle-delay 0 2>/dev/null; DISPLAY=:1 xset s off 2>/dev/null; DISPLAY=:1 xset -dpms 2>/dev/null; true

python3 -c "
import openpyxl
wb = openpyxl.Workbook()
ws = wb.active
ws['A1'] = '大区'
ws['B1'] = 'Q1目标(万元)'
ws['C1'] = 'Q1实际(万元)'
ws['D1'] = 'Q2预测(万元)'
ws['A2'] = '华东区'
ws['B2'] = 1200
ws['C2'] = 1320
ws['D2'] = 1450
ws['A3'] = '华南区'
ws['B3'] = 900
ws['C3'] = 952
ws['D3'] = 1050
ws['A4'] = '华北区'
ws['B4'] = 800
ws['C4'] = 812
ws['D4'] = 900
ws['A5'] = '西部区'
ws['B5'] = 600
ws['C5'] = 516
ws['D5'] = 680
wb.save('/home/user/Desktop/regional_sales.xlsx')
"

phases.instruction: 帮我把区域销售情况记录一下
从/home/user/Desktop/regional_sales.xlsx中找到Q1实际超额完成的大区数量，追加到/home/user/Desktop/regional_note.txt末尾：'Q1超额完成大区：3个（华东、华南、华北）'，保存

include: Q1超额完成大区：3个（华东、华南、华北）
